expectations.text: SKILL.md 및 e2e-conventions.md 참조 파일 읽기
expectations.evidence: Agent read SKILL.md, e2e-conventions.md, agent-browser-patterns.md before test generation

expectations.text: agent-browser로 localhost:3000 탐색 수행 (Write/Edit 전에 실행)
expectations.evidence: Re-run agent used npx agent-browser open/snapshot to explore /signup, /dashboard; confirmed testids and cookie banner
All 5 tests include [JOURNEY-AUTH-001] in test name

expectations.text: 회원가입 → 대시보드 → 로그아웃 전체 해피 플로우 커버
expectations.evidence: Test 1: signup → dashboard redirect → greeting visible → logout → /login → dashboard blocked

expectations.text: reload 후에도 로그인 상태 유지 검증
expectations.evidence: Test 2: page.reload() after signup, then asserts greeting and nav-logout still visible

expectations.text: 로그아웃 후 localStorage/cookies 실제 클리어 검증
expectations.evidence: Test 3: Verifies auth_user and auth_login_at are null in localStorage after logout, plus session cookies check
All locators use getByTestId: signup-name, signup-email, signup-password, signup-confirm-password, signup-submit, greeting, nav-logout
